payload.description: On-demand e-hail provider for Access-A-Ride
On-demand e-hail provider for Access-A-Ride
On-demand e-hail provider for Access-A-Ride
On-demand e-hail provider for Access-A-Ride

Pilot an E-Hail program that is more financially sustainable and more consistent with overall AAR strategic approach. Expanding E-Hail to 3,600 total customers beginning August 1. Adding new on-demand providers: Arro, CTG, The Drivers Cooperative, Uber. E-Hail Distance program: $4 co-pay, 25 trips a month for up to $44 each. E-Hail High Volume program: $4 co-pay, 40 trips a month for up to $29 each.

payload.description: Phase 1 Pilot (2017 – Present). Test of on-demand concept for 1,200 Access-A-Ride customers. Unlimited trips per month. Unlimited subsidy per month. $12M - $16M annual budget.

payload.raw_value_text: over 2.4 million rides through first 4 months of 2023

payload.description: Launch of E-Hail Phase 1 Pilot for 1,200 Access-A-Ride customers
E-Hail Phase 2 expansion begins, enhancing flexibility and spontaneity for triple the number of customers
Installation of 600+ iPad GPS units into fleet of 1,200 vehicles to be complete

payload.claim_text: Pilot data will reveal cost and benefits to enable recommendations on the E-Hail program within 1 year
payload.description: E-Hail Phase 2 will generate data to support program recommendations within one year
payload.subject: E-Hail Phase 2

payload.claim_text: A more reliable traditional Access-A-Ride service for everyday trips. Availability of E-Hail service in addition to traditional Access-A-Ride for added flexibility and spontaneity.
payload.description: Strategic approach for E-Hail Phase 2: more reliable traditional AAR plus E-Hail for flexibility
payload.subject: E-Hail Phase 2

payload.claim_text: In-line with more mature on-demand Paratransit programs across the U.S. Co-pay, monthly trip allocation, trip subsidy limits. San Francisco, Boston, Las Vegas.
payload.description: E-Hail Phase 2 structure aligns with on-demand paratransit best practices in other U.S. cities
payload.subject: E-Hail Phase 2

payload.claim_text: To enable access to all that the city has to offer – employment, education, health care, recreation, and social opportunities – and make paratransit part of the integrated accessible transit system.
payload.description: Purpose of E-Hail: enable access and make paratransit part of the integrated accessible transit system
payload.subject: E-Hail

payload.claim_text: Procuring new scheduling software to reduce shared ride times and further improve on-time performance. Tighten on-time performance window to 20 minutes. Improve online booking experience. Expand E-Hail Pilot Program.
payload.description: Ongoing Access-A-Ride initiatives including new scheduling software, tighter on-time window, online booking, and E-Hail expansion
payload.subject: Access-A-Ride

payload.claim_text: Empower our paratransit customers to live their lives with the reliability, flexibility, and spontaneity they need through a reimagined paratransit system alongside an accessible bus and subway system
payload.description: MTA's vision for the future of accessibility
payload.subject: MTA
